headline: Inflation Data, Oracle Earnings: What to Watch Next Week
summary: Next week brings a slate of potentially market-moving events, with inflation data front and center. Wednesday's consumer-price index and Friday's personal-consumption expenditures index will offer the Federal Reserve two new reads on price pressures.

raw.headline: Inflation Data, Oracle Earnings: What to Watch Next Week

headline: How The Adobe (ADBE) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Deals And Cooler Valuation Hopes
summary: Adobe’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$447.56 to US$408.47, a trim that puts the modeled upside in a different light for anyone watching the stock closely. That change sits against a backdrop of analysts weighing cautious views on valuation and AI execution against more optimistic takes on product adoption and AI related monetization. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and what to watch as the Adobe story continues to evolve. Analyst Price...

headline: 1 Undervalued Stock That Could Rebound in 2026
summary: At what point does the broad stock market cease to “look” expensive? Of course, the AI run-up has made for rather swollen valuation metrics in a wide number of names. And while the S&P 500 itself might be trading at a bit of a lofty premium, I’d also argue that there’s value out there. The ... 1 Undervalued Stock That Could Rebound in 2026
